Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: patterns by specific type [300168686], patterns (design elements) [300010108], design elements (attributes) [300009699], Design Elements (hierarchy name) [300123558], Physical Attributes Facet [300264087]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Patterns of or pertaining to flowers.
Patrones de o pertenecientes a las flores.
外觀與花相同或與花有關的圖案。
Padrões ou o que pertence a flores

Source.Source_ID: 2000020951/Ware and Stafford, Illustrated Dictionary of Ornament (1974)
2000116780/國家教育研究院－雙語詞彙、學術名詞暨辭書資訊網
2000116783/教育部重編國語辭典修訂本
2000020951/Ware and Stafford, Illustrated Dictionary of Ornament (1974)
